# PurposeLab Studio

> PurposeLab Studio builds simple, free, ad-free Android apps for the Indian market. Privacy-first tools that do one thing well — no ads, no subscriptions, no data harvesting.

## Folio (Featured Product)

Folio is a free, offline, private daily journal and mood tracker for Android and iOS by PurposeLab Studio. It is the studio's flagship app.

- What it is: a calm daily journal plus gentle mood and habit tracking, with a monthly reflection that surfaces your patterns.
- Key facts: no ads, no account, no subscription for core use, and no streaks or guilt mechanics; all entries are stored locally on-device with optional app lock; works fully offline. India-first.
- Best for: people who want a private journaling habit without pressure, streaks, or cloud accounts.
- Guide: [The Calm Guide to Daily Journaling](https://purposelabstudio.com/folio/journal/) — curated prompts and guides for starting a journal and keeping it.
- Get it: [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.purposelab.folio) · [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/folio-daily-journal-diary/id6781551692)

## Apps

- [Crumbs — Your Private Second Brain on WhatsApp](https://purposelabstudio.com/crumbs/): Dump notes, ideas, todos, reminders, links, photos and voice on WhatsApp, then ask for any of it back in plain language. Multilingual, private, and calm. Mobile apps coming soon.
- [Folio — Daily Journal & Mood Tracker](https://purposelabstudio.com/folio/): Calm daily journal & notebook. A page a day — no streaks, no ads, fully offline. Private, app-locked, India-first.
- [WaterWise — Drink Water Reminder](https://purposelabstudio.com/waterwise/): Stay hydrated with streaks, smart reminders, and one-tap logging. No ads, no paywall.
- [BP Log — Blood Pressure Tracker](https://purposelabstudio.com/bplog/): Log readings from your home BP monitor. See AHA-classified trends, 7-day averages, and share PDF reports with your doctor. 100% offline.
- [Hushly — Baby Sleep Sounds](https://purposelabstudio.com/hushly/): Soothing sounds to help your baby sleep peacefully. Curated audio, simple controls, no ads ever.

## Tools

- [Daily Water Intake Calculator](https://purposelabstudio.com/tools/water-intake-calculator/): Free calculator — enter weight, activity, and climate for a personalised daily hydration target. Pairs with WaterWise.
- [Blood Pressure Category Checker](https://purposelabstudio.com/tools/blood-pressure-checker/): Enter systolic/diastolic to see the AHA category. Educational reference. Pairs with BP Log.
- [Journaling Prompt Generator](https://purposelabstudio.com/tools/journal-prompt-generator/): Free daily writing prompts to beat the blank page. Pairs with Folio.
- [Free White Noise Player](https://purposelabstudio.com/tools/white-noise-player/): Play white, pink, or brown noise in the browser with a sleep timer. Generated on-device, no downloads. Pairs with Hushly.

## Comparison Guides

- [Best Free Blood Pressure App](https://purposelabstudio.com/best-free-blood-pressure-app/): What to look for in a free BP tracker and how BP Log compares — free, offline, no ads.
- [Best Free Water Reminder App](https://purposelabstudio.com/best-free-water-reminder-app/): How to pick a water reminder and why WaterWise is ad-free with no paywall.
- [Best Free Baby Sleep Sounds App](https://purposelabstudio.com/best-free-baby-sleep-app/): What matters in a baby sleep app and how Hushly compares — curated sounds, no ads.
- [Best Free Journal App With Lock](https://purposelabstudio.com/best-free-journal-app/): Choosing a private journal app and how Folio compares — app lock, offline, no ads.

## Key Facts

- All apps are 100% free with no ads, no subscriptions, and no in-app purchases
- Data never leaves the user's device (offline-first architecture)
- Target market: India
- Available on Google Play Store
- Built with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Material 3
- Developer: PurposeLab Studio
